response.justification: Strong engineering tenure (19 years) and diverse technical depth across platforms and domains meet the baseline requirements, but the role requires director-level AI strategy expertise with demonstrated AI products—the candidate is currently a Staff Engineer with roughly 14 months in AI infrastructure work, insufficient to establish the recognized AI expertise and strategic advising background the role demands.
strengths: Exceeds minimum tenure with 19 years of diverse software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP frameworks) at re:cinq, showing recent pivot toward AI
Proven entrepreneurial track record founding and maintaining GISCollective since 2016, with strong technical craftsmanship demonstrated across multiple Staff-level roles
concerns: AI expertise is recent (14 months in current role); 18+ prior years show no AI/ML focus, no demonstrated AI products or platforms to meet preferred qualifications
Current seniority is Staff Engineer; role requires director-level individual contributor with strategic leadership and customer advisory responsibilities
No evidence of strategic consulting, customer advisory, or platform strategy experience; background is primarily hands-on engineering
